title: I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server
description:
truly an unstable smp

I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨ @FlameFragsMC 
➜   @ParrotX2 
➜   @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨ @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags motif right before egg shows up LOL)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

title: One Mile | Official Trailer | Paramount Movies
description:
ONE MILE: CHAPTER ONE
Ryan Phillippe stars as a former special forces operative trying to reconnect with his teenage daughter during a college road trip. When an unexpected detour puts them in the sights of a secretive, off-the-grid community, his daughter is taken and the trip erupts into a high-octane fight for survival. Alone and outnumbered, he’s forced to use every skill he has to track them down, take them apart, and bring his daughter home.

ONE MILE: CHAPTER TWO
A former special forces operative (Ryan Phillippe) is forced back onto a remote island when the violent, secretive community he fought once before abducts his daughter in an act of revenge. Launched into a relentless hunt, he faces an enemy that’s ready and anticipating his every move.

SUBSCRIBE To Paramount Movies: https://www.youtube.com/@paramountmovies?sub_confirmation=1

Welcome to the Official Paramount Movies YouTube Channel! Here we’ll be celebrating Paramount Pictures’ iconic films and new releases. We’ll take you deeper into your favorite movies, such as Sonic the Hedgehog, Top Gun, A Quiet Place, Transformers, Star Trek, Forrest Gump, Mission: Impossible, and many more!

ABOUT PARAMOUNT PICTURES
Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
00:00:00 Cinematic Opening & Chapter 5 Start
00:03:12 Huggy Wuggy Chase Tutorial Escape
00:30:28 Meeting Giblet
00:32:43 First Prototype Encounter
00:41:55 Bron & GrabPack 3.0
00:45:40 New Pressure Hand
00:57:56 Limon Easter Egg
01:09:16 Meeting Chum Chompkins
01:22:31 Magnetic Bracelets
01:36:09 Prototype Returns
01:53:47 Huggy Memory: “I’ve Always Been a Toy”
02:07:53 Blue VHS Tape
02:14:36 Playing As Huggy Wuggy
02:25:24 Entering Sweet Street
02:33:56 Meeting Lily Lovebraids
02:35:57 Finding Kissy Missy & Poppy
03:03:18 Prototype Face Reveal
03:30:23 Huggy & Kissy Reunion

title: Fast & Furious 11 (2026) - First Trailer | Vin Diesel, Cristiano Ronaldo
description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #CristianoRonaldo

Family built the legend — and now it will decide the end.

Editing, Adobe Premiere, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by ‪‪@USTrailerStudio‬ please subscribe for more:

🎥 Attention Viewers!

This video is a fan-made cinematic concept, created for artistic expression and entertainment only. Powered by AI innovations (Google Veo 3), professional-grade sound design, and visual storytelling, it reimagines what modern filmmaking can be.
Every frame was built with creativity and passion—no official affiliation, just pure imagination.
Enjoy the experience, share the vision, and let’s keep pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in film. 🍿🎬

🚗 FAST & FURIOUS 11

The ultimate showdown begins in FAST & FURIOUS 11 (2026) — where loyalty is tested, bloodlines collide, and the final game is set in motion. Dominic Toretto faces his most calculated and relentless opponent yet: the Elite Enforcer. What starts as a race becomes a war, and survival means more than speed.

In this explosive new chapter, family is no longer just strength — it’s a target. As alliances fracture and the canyon battlefield ignites, Dom must confront a force that matches him in discipline, precision, and brutality. With massive practical stunts, high-stakes action, and raw emotional intensity, this trailer delivers the most dangerous confrontation in the franchise’s history.

Will family win again… or has the game changed forever?

title: They Gave Us FREE Neymar With the Most OP Skill?! Prof BOF reviews BLITZ CURLER NEYMAR🤯
description:
Prof BOF reviews FREE Showtime Neymar in eFootball 26, and this card comes with one of the most overpowered skills in the game — Blitz Curler.

From outside-the-box screamers to tight-angle curlers, Neymar feels absolutely unstoppable with this ability. For a FREE card, this might be one of the best value players Konami has ever released.

In this video, I test:

✅ Long-range shooting & finesse

✅ Pace and attacking movement
✅ Best position & tactical fit

If you’re wondering whether to build or start this Neymar, this review shows exactly what he can do.

title: MOTHER'S LOVE OFFICIAL TRAILER
description:
When Love Holds You in a Chokehold 💔 | A Mother’s Love - Official Trailer

What happens when the love that is meant to protect you is the very thing that breaks you?

Two women. One bond. A lifetime of unspoken truths.

Directed by the phenomenal Dr. Omotola Jalade Ekeinde in her directorial debut, A Mother’s Love dares to ask the questions no one wants to answer. Is control just a disguise for protection? And when the gilded cage starts to close in, which bonds will survive?

This March, enter a world where grief shapes destinies and a reckoning is inevitable.

👉  so you don’t miss it!

title: Toy Story 5 | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 19
description:
Times may change but friends are forever
#ToyStory5 is only in theaters June 19

An all-new trailer and poster for Disney and Pixar’s highly anticipated upcoming animated adventure “Toy Story 5” debut today. The toys are back and this time, Buzz Lightyear, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they come face-to-face with Lilypad (voice of Greta Lee), a brand-new tablet device that arrives with her own disruptive ideas about what is best for their kid, Bonnie. Will playtime ever be the same?
 
The trailer also teases the anticipated reunion of Woody and Buzz following Woody’s decision to leave the gang and start helping lost toys at the end of 2019’s “Toy Story 4.” As the toys face the tech devices of today, it’s going to be all hands on deck with some familiar and all-new characters.
 
Several actors have joined the incredible roster of voice talent including Craig Robinson as Atlas, a cheerful talking GPS hippo toy; Shelby Rabara as the excitable camera toy Snappy; Scarlett Spears as the sweet and shy 8-year-old Bonnie; Mykal-Michelle Harris as Blaze, an independent 8-year-old girl who loves animals; and Matty Matheson as the tech-fearing toy Dr. Nutcase.
 
Also rounding out the voice cast are John Ratzenberger as the wisecracking piggybank Hamm; Wallace Shawn as Rex, the anxiety-riddled tyrannosaurus rex toy; Blake Clark as the ever-loyal Slinky Dog; Jeff Bergman as the sarcastic Mr. Potato Head; Anna Vocino as the nurturing Mrs. Potato Head; Annie Potts as the adventure-loving Bo Peep; Bonnie Hunt as the wise rag-doll Dolly; Melissa Villaseñor as Karen Beverly, Bonnie’s homemade toy fashioned out of a plastic knife; John Hopkins as the dignified hedgehog plush toy Mr. Pricklepants; Kristen Schaal as the plastic triceratops toy Trixie; Ernie Hudson as the action figure Combat Carl; and Keanu Reeves as Canadian daredevil toy Duke Caboom.
 
The previously announced voice cast includes Tom Hanks (Woody), Tim Allen (Buzz Lightyear), Joan Cusack (Jessie), Greta Lee (Lilypad), Conan O’Brien (Smarty Pants) and Tony Hale (Forky).
 
“Toy Story 5” is directed by Academy Award® winner Andrew Stanton (“WALL•E,” “Finding Nemo,” “Finding Dory”), co-directed by Kenna Harris (“Ciao Alberto”), produced by Lindsey Collins (“Turning Red,” “WALL•E,” “Finding Dory”), and features an original score by Academy Award® winner Randy Newman who returns to score his fifth “Toy Story” feature. The film releases exclusively in theaters nationwide on June 19, 2026. 
 
ABOUT PIXAR:
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”
 
SOCIAL MEDIA:
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@Pixar
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/Pixar
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Pixar
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Pixar
X: https://x.com/Pixar
Official: https://movies.disney.com/Toy-Story-5
Hashtag: #ToyStory5

title: OWNER Gave Me ADMIN COMMANDS In Survive Lava For Brainrots..
description:
Today I played with caylus and he gave me admin commands in his new game. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
